title: Apply black/red theme, update pricing in INR, add phone number, remove address, set working hours

requirements.summary: Update the visual theme across the entire website to use a black and red color combination
acceptanceCriteria: Primary accent color is red (not amber/gold) throughout the site
All CTA buttons, borders, highlights, and icons use the red accent color
Theme is applied consistently across Navbar, Hero, Services, About, Contact, and Footer

file_operations.description: Replace amber/gold CSS custom properties with red accent colors. Update the primary color tokens to use red shades (e.g., OKLCH equivalents of red-500, red-600) instead of amber. Keep dark backgrounds intact.
Update the garage brand palette colors from amber/gold to red tones. Replace amber-* color values with red equivalents in the theme extension while preserving the dark background tokens.
Ensure all accent elements (CTA button, hover states, active states) use the new red theme instead of amber/gold. Update any inline Tailwind classes that reference amber colors to use red.
Update CTA buttons, borders, and accent elements to use red instead of amber/gold. Ensure gradient overlays and highlights reflect the new color scheme.
Replace amber/gold accent colors in service cards, borders, CTA buttons, and highlights with red. Maintain dark backgrounds.
Update the gold-bordered blockquote and any accent elements to use red borders and highlights instead of amber/gold.
Replace amber/gold accent colors in contact cards, form elements, and CTA buttons with red. Ensure form focus states and highlights use the new red theme.
Update any amber/gold accent colors in links, social media icons, and borders to red. Ensure consistency with the new theme.

requirements.summary: Update the Services section pricing to reflect Indian Rupee amounts
acceptanceCriteria: Basic Exterior Wash is priced at ₹599
No dollar or other currency symbols appear anywhere on the page

file_operations.description: Update the three service cards to display the new Indian Rupee pricing: Basic Exterior Wash at ₹599, Interior + Exterior at ₹1499, and Bike Wash at ₹299. Replace all existing pricing labels and currency symbols with the ₹ symbol. Ensure the mapping matches the service names correctly (Basic Wash → Basic Exterior Wash, Full Detail → Interior + Exterior, and identify or add the Bike Wash service if not present).

requirements.summary: Add phone number +91 8527230903 to Contact section and remove address information
acceptanceCriteria: Phone number +91 8527230903 is visible in the Contact section
Phone number is a clickable tel: link
No address or location information is displayed in the Contact section

file_operations.description: Add the phone number +91 8527230903 as a clickable tel: link in the contact information area. Remove any address or location cards/fields currently displayed in the Contact section. Ensure the phone number is prominently shown alongside other contact info.

requirements.summary: Display working hours Monday to Sunday, 8:00 AM – 4:00 PM in the Contact section
acceptanceCriteria: Working hours are shown as Monday – Sunday, 8:00 AM – 4:00 PM
Working hours are clearly labeled in the Contact section
No conflicting or outdated hours are displayed

file_operations.description: Add or update the working hours display in the Contact section to show 'Monday – Sunday, 8:00 AM – 4:00 PM'. If a working hours card already exists, replace its content; otherwise, add a new info card clearly labeled as 'Working Hours'.
